docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF ADMINSTARTIVE DECISION, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER FREEMAN, REUEL DAVID
RESPONDENT'S OPPOSITION TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT BORUCKI, JOAN , DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER REUEL FREEMAN'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE. ARGUED AND THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. SUBMITTED ON MAR-06-2007 BY JUDGE PATRICK J. MAHONEY. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
